title: Union all across two queries with same select shape
prompt: Write `MyApp.Notifications.all_events/1` that takes a user id and unions two streams: (a) posts authored by the user as `{type: "post", id, inserted_at, title}`, (b) comments by the user as `{type: "comment", id, inserted_at, body}`. Use `union_all/2` to combine them, then order the combined result by `inserted_at desc`. Both subqueries must have identical column shape (rename `body` to `title` for comments via select). Write to `lib/my_app/notifications.ex`.
tier_rationale: Ecto `union_all` requires exact column shape match across branches. Non-obvious and rarely used.
